privileged_info_for_vlm: The project directory is /home/ga/PycharmProjects/flight_planner. The codebase contains four specific bugs to be fixed: 1) Distance unit error (KM vs NM), 2) Bearing quadrant error (atan vs atan2), 3) Wind effect sign error (Headwind adds speed instead of subtracting), 4) Fuel time unit error (Minutes vs Hours). The test suite contains exactly 15 tests, all of which must pass.
